def solve(landStartTime, landDuration, waterStartTime, waterDuration)
  min_time = infinity
  n = landStartTime.length
  m = waterStartTime.length
  for i in 0...n
    for j in 0...m
      # 计算情况一：陆地先
      land_end = landStartTime[i] + landDuration[i]
      water_start = [waterStartTime[j], land_end].max
      water_end = water_start + waterDuration[j]
      total = water_end
      min_time = [min_time, total].min

      # 计算情况二：水上先
      water_end = waterStartTime[j] + waterDuration[j]
      land_start = [landStartTime[i], water_end].max
      land_end = land_start + landDuration[i]
      total = land_end
      min_time = [min_time, total].min
    end
  end
  return min_time
end
